## PADRÕES DE PENSAMENTO

| Padrão | Descrição | Frequência |
|--------|-----------|------------|
| Experience-First Teaching | Demonstrates bad + good before explaining theory | Every module + video |
| Self-Deprecating Humor | Uses humor about himself to build connection | Constant |
| Student Before/After | Shows real transformation as proof | SA Modules 2-5, YT coaching videos |
| Musical Metaphors | Piano keys, legato/staccato, melody — voice IS music | SA + YT throughout |
| Framework Simplification | Distills complex models to 3-5 steps max | SA + YT throughout |
| Default Identification | First step: identify what you're stuck in | Throughout |
| Repetition as Mastery | Same core principles repeated across videos — intentional | YT (365 videos, same foundations) |
| Book-to-Life Application | Reviews books by applying to personal stories | Vinh & Ali Show (18+ episodes) |
| Fear→Excitement Reframe | Reframes nervousness as excitement (same symptoms) | YT fear/confidence videos |
| Magician Mindset | Uses magic as metaphor for all communication | SA + YT throughout |
| Progressive Exposure | Advocates graduated steps for any fear/skill | YT confidence/anxiety videos |
| Give First Philosophy | In networking, teaching, and relationships — give value first | YT networking + philosophy |

## EXPRESSÕES TÍPICAS

### From Stage Academy (SA)
- "It's not the best idea that wins. It's the best communicator."
- "If it distracts from the message, it's a problem."
- "Don't confuse unfamiliar with fake."
- "Your voice is an instrument with 88 keys."
- "Default = monotony = disengagement."
- "Make the horse thirsty first."
- "Don't judge yourself on chapter one."

### From YouTube (YT)
- "Your career will never outgrow your communication."
- "Communication is not a soft skill — it's an essential skill."
- "I can't give what I don't have."
- "Scars tell better stories than wounds."
- "Fear + Action = Courage."
- "Natural isn't natural. It's rehearsed."
- "The goal isn't to impress. The goal is to help others understand."
- "There's no such thing as adults. We're all big kids pretending."
- "The reason I'm telling you this story is because..."
- "It's only awkward if you make it awkward."
- "Dollar cost average your actions."
- "The price of greatness is you first have to be a little bit shit."
- "Reality is negotiable."
- "Be so good they can't ignore you."
- "You are the author of your own story. Take your pen back."
- "See you in the next video."

## KEY FRAMEWORKS SUMMARY

### From Stage Academy (SA)
| Framework | Steps | Domain |
|-----------|-------|--------|
| 5 Universal Laws | 88 Keys, Practice, No Auto Transfer, Temp Judgments, Generosity | Core |
| 5 Vocal Foundations | Rate, Volume, Pitch/Melody, Tonality, Pause | Voice |
| 4 Vocal Archetypes | Motivator, Educator, Coach, Friend | Voice |
| 4MAT Sequencing | Friend→Motivator(why)→Educator(what)→Coach(how)→Friend | Presentation |
| 3-Step Story Formula | Incident(VAKS+characters)→Transformation→Life Lesson | Storytelling |
| 4 Chemical Framework | Dopamine, Oxytocin, Endorphins, Cortisol | Storytelling |
| Satir 5 Categories | Placator, Leveler, Blamer, Computer, Distractor | Body Language |
| Power Sphere | Belly button to eyes = optimal gesture zone | Body Language |
| Vocal Coach Pipeline | Respiration→Phonation→Resonation→Articulation | Vocal Training |
| Self-Awareness Technique | Record→Review→Identify defaults→Practice→Integrate | Meta-skill |

### From YouTube (YT) — Key Additions
| Framework | Steps | Domain |
|-----------|-------|--------|
| STAR | Situation→Task→Action→Result | Impromptu Speaking |
| PREP | Point→Reason→Example→Point | Structured Communication |
| 3-2-1 | 3 Steps / 2 Types / 1 Thing — pick any as constraint | Anti-Rambling |
| PARA | Point→Action→Result→Ask | Conversation |
| FORD | Family, Occupation, Recreation, Dreams | Networking |
| High-Low-Buffalo | High + Low + Buffalo = 6 threads for deep conversation | Conversation |
| Four Colors | Red/Yellow/Green/Blue communication adaptation | Influence |
| Record and Review | 3 separate reviews: vocal, visual, verbal | Self-Improvement |
| 30-Day Plan | 4 weeks × 1 behavior = transformation | Mastery |
| Look-Feel-Sound | Focus Look+Sound (easy) → Feel follows | Confidence |
| 5-Second Anti-Freeze | Psychological→Physiological→Structural | Impromptu Speaking |
| Mastery Cycle | Try/Apply→Review/Reflect→Plan/Improve→Repeat | Mastery |
| 5 Energy Buckets | Health, Alignment, Fulfillment, Creativity, Play | Energy |
| 3 Storytelling Ingredients | Specific + Relive + Meaning | Storytelling |
| Desensitization Ladder | Progressive exposure from hello to full conversation | Confidence |
| Speak and Grow Rich | 10 chapters mapping Napoleon Hill to communication | Communication |
| Dollar Cost Average | 5 tracked actions/day compounds over 12 months | Personal Development |
| Solve-Accept-Leave | For any problem: take action, make peace, or walk away | Life Philosophy |
| Recalibration Check-in | 7 questions every 6 months to course-correct | Life Philosophy |
| Version 1.0 Creative | Release → feedback → iterate → maintain soul | Creativity |
